name: reviewing-design-specs
description: Structured review of technical design specs (Confluence, Markdown, text) - Socratic clarity pass (surfaces implicit/ambiguous/missing info), coherence, over-engineering, SOLID, HTTP semantics, GDPR, CDN/Varnish PII leaks, observability, architectural N+1, and domain-specific concerns (email, API, data pipeline, auth, payments). Supports --interactive mode for inline clarification.
